- [ ] `cd src-tauri && cargo check` — 0 errors

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project style and conventions
- [ ] I've verified TypeScript and Rust compile without errors
- [ ] No commented-out code, debug prints, or TODO comments remain
- [ ] New Rust code uses `?` for error handling and follows existing patterns
- [ ] New frontend code uses Tailwind CSS classes consistently
- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
